components.css: .hp-custom,.hp-custom-body{display:flex;flex-direction:column;width:100%;height:100%;min-width:0;min-height:0;margin:0!important;padding:0!important;gap:0!important;overflow-y:auto;overflow-x:hidden;background:#ffffff;box-sizing:border-box}.hp-custom-repeat-row{display:block;width:100%;min-width:0;margin:0!important;padding:0!important;border:0;border-radius:0;cursor:pointer;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box}.category-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 42px;align-items:center;width:100%;min-width:0;min-height:46px;margin:0;padding:8px 10px 8px 12px;gap:10px;border:0;border-bottom:1px solid #e3e9f0;border-radius:0;background:#ffffff;box-shadow:none;box-sizing:border-box;pointer-events:none;transition:background-color .15s ease,box-shadow .15s ease}.hp-custom-repeat-row:last-child .category-row{border-bottom:0}.hp-custom-repeat-row:hover .category-row{background:#f5f9fe}.hp-custom-repeat-row:focus-visible .category-row{box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2px #206bc4}.category-label{display:block;min-width:0;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;color:#26384a;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;line-height:20px;pointer-events:none}.category-switch{position:relative;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;width:42px;height:24px;border:1px solid #b7c4d1;border-radius:999px;background:#d5dde6;box-shadow:inset 0 1px 3px rgb(24 36 51 / 12%);box-sizing:border-box;pointer-events:none;transition:background-color .18s ease,border-color .18s ease,box-shadow .18s ease}.category-knob{position:absolute;top:3px;left:3px;width:16px;height:16px;border-radius:50%;background:#ffffff;box-shadow:0 2px 5px rgb(24 36 51 / 28%);pointer-events:none;transition:transform .18s ease}.hp-custom-repeat-row.is-selected .category-row{background:#edf6ff;box-shadow:inset 3px 0 0 #206bc4}.hp-custom-repeat-row.is-selected .category-label{color:#174f84;font-weight:700}.hp-custom-repeat-row.is-selected .category-switch{background:#206bc4;border-color:#206bc4;box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgb(32 107 196 / 12%)}.hp-custom-repeat-row.is-selected .category-knob{transform:translateX(18px)}
